CheckTitle: Ensure agent identities are created by authorized applications
Description: Checks the createdByAppId field on agent identities to detect agents that were created by non-admin or unauthorized applications, such as user self-service via Copilot Studio without admin governance.
Risk: Agents created by unauthorized applications bypass admin governance review. The creating application determines the initial security posture of the agent identity.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review the creating application and verify it is an approved agent provisioning tool. Restrict agent creation to authorized applications via Entra ID app management policies.

SourceNotes: createdByAppId was added to application and servicePrincipal resources in March 2026.
